title: WICSE 40th Anniversary - EECS at Berkeley
content: WICSE 40th Anniversary - EECS at Berkeley WiCSE 40th Anniversary The UC Berkeley Women in Computer Science and Engineering (WiCSE) 40th Anniversary Reunion, which celebrates 40 years of women in technology at Berkeley, will be held on Saturday, March 17, 2018. Join us for a day packed full of reunions, enlightening talks, and networking opportunities! View the Program A note from WiCSE Co-Presidents Alice Ye and Coline Devin We are proud to add speakers throughout the day including Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu. Prof. King Liu was the Chair of the Electrical Engineering and Computer Science from July 2014-June 2016, and is the current Vice-Provost for Academic and Space Planning at University of California, Berkeley. WiCSE is also planning a day of activities including lightning talks on career paths and research by current graduate students and alumni, retrospectives on WiCSE history, as well as panels and discussions on diversity within electrical engineering and computer science. We hope this event will foster mentorship and visibility for alumnae and current students. Date and Time Saturday, March 17, 2018 11:00 AM - 6:00 PM PDT Location Banatao Auditorium and Kvamme Atrium 3rd floor Sutardja Dai Hall 1860 Leroy Avenue Berkeley, CA 94720 Schedule You can find the schedule on the WICSE 40th Anniversary web page Sessions Technical Lightning Talks from Alumnae Women in Tech "Pathways after Berkeley" Panel Diversity Round Table - what has worked and what hasn't to include more women in Tech Perspectives through the Decades of WICSE Lightning Speakers Marti Hearst , EECS/iSchool, UC Berkeley Lili Kan , Uber Advanced Technology Group Gireeja Ranade , Microsoft Research AI Virginia Smith , Stanford/CMU Beth Trushkowsky , Harvey Mudd College Ei-Mang Wu , TenMarks Keynote Speakers Diane Greene , CEO of Google Cloud Tsu-Jae King Liu , EECS Professor at UC Berkeley Barbara Simons , Board Chair of Verified Voting Event FAQ What are my transportation/parking options for getting to and from the event? If driving, street parking is available along Hearst Ave for the duration of the day. Public transportation is also an option: Soda Hall is around a 10 minute walk from the Downtown Berkeley BART Station. How can I contact the organizer with any questions? Please email wicse.berkeley@gmail.com if you have any questions about the event! Whom should I contact if I'm interested in sponsoring this event? Any sponsors interested in funding this event should contact Becca Roelofs (roelofs at cs.berkeley.edu ). Panelists Pathways After Berkeley Adrienne Felt , Google Chrome Leslie Field , Ice911 Research/SmallTech Consulting Janey Hoe , Cisco Investments Hayley Iben , Pixar Animation Studios Diversity Round Table Francesca Barrientos , Security Business Group at Cisco Chen-Nee Chuah , U. C. Davis Regina Eckert , Bias Busters @ Cal EECS Marie-Ange Eyoum Tagne , Amazon Lab 126 Perspectives Through the Decades of WiCSE Paula Hawthorn , retired executive/software developer Kim Keeton, HP Labs Isabelle Stanton , Google Women Faculty in EE Ana Claudia Arias Connie Chang-Hasnain Tsu-Jae King Liu Rikky Muller Gireeja Ranade Somayeh Sojoudi Alexandra von Meier Avideh Zakhor Women Faculty in EE/CS Ruzena Bajcsy Claire Tomlin Laura Waller Bin Yu Women Faculty in CS Anca Dragan Shafi Goldwasser Sue Graham (emerita) Marti Hearst Jennifer Listgarten Raluca Ada Popa Sylvia Ratnasamy Dawn Song Kathy Yelick [[{"fid":"151″,"view_mode":"default","fields":{"format":"default","field_file_image_alt_text[und][0][value]":false,"field_file_image_title_text[und][0][value]":"Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu, Chair of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at Berkeley"},"type":"media","field_deltas":{"1":{"format":"default","field_file_image_alt_text[und][0][value]":false,"field_file_image_title_text[und][0][value]":"Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu, Chair of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at Berkeley"}},"attributes":{"title":"Prof. Tsu-Jae King Liu, Chair of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at Berkeley","class":"media-element file-default","data-delta":"1″}}]] "Join us at the anniversary celebration of WICSE to reconnect with other alumnae and to meet the newest generation of women in Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. It promises to be an inspiring event!" Tsu-Jae King Liu Vice Provost, Academic and Space Planning TSMC Distinguished Professor in Microelectronics, EECS Department, UC Berkeley "EECS alumnae are vitally important to sustaining the WICSE community. We hope to welcome you to campus on March 17 to celebrate WICSE's remarkable history, to meet current students, and share your experience."
